founders.name: Maya Chen
founders.headline: Technical founder building NeuralKit for model observability
founders.bio: Synthetic cache profile for the deterministic demo. Her public footprint is intentionally thin.

signals.text: Synthetic HN-style evidence: Maya said NeuralKit was pre-revenue three weeks ago.
Synthetic market note: AI infrastructure teams are increasing spend on model observability.
Synthetic customer note: an AI infrastructure team reported this workflow as a priority.
Synthetic product signal: Maya published a working model-observability demo.
Synthetic background signal: Maya won a university AI systems hackathon.
Synthetic repository signal: a comparable open-source observability tool is gaining adoption.

founders.name: Iris Laurent
founders.headline: Compiler engineer building inference infrastructure
founders.bio: Cache-backed profile with public implementation and shipping signals.

signals.text: Iris released a GPU inference scheduling repository with reproducible benchmarks.
A launch post describes a paid pilot with an AI infrastructure team in Europe.
Iris co-authored a systems paper on model serving throughput.

founders.name: Noah Petrov
founders.headline: Developer tools founder exploring AI evaluation workflows
founders.bio: Early public footprint. The wide score band is visible rather than treated as a negative.

signals.text: Noah shipped a small evaluation workflow demo for engineering teams.
Noah maintains a public developer tooling repository.
